% cv-interests.tex (tagged) — \cvinterest{icon}{text} list rows.
% Generated by stklug84/actions cv/parse — do not edit by hand.
% Each interest renders with a small representative FontAwesome icon as its
% bullet (from the optional per-interest `icon` field); when no icon is set
% the style falls back to its default square bullet. The icon is the bare
% control-sequence NAME (e.g. "faBicycle"); the style turns it into \faBicycle.
\cvsidelist{%
  \cvinterest{faBicycle}{Radfahren}
  \cvinterest{}{Bergwandern}
}
